name: PUBG Profile
description: Shows a PUBG profile with account id, platform, recent matches, wins, kills, damage, and K/D.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**Account**
Name: `{pubg_name}`
Account ID: `{account_id}`
Platform: `{platform}`
Shard: `{shard}`
Recent Matches: `{recent_matches}`

**Lifetime Stats ({game_mode})**
Rounds: `{rounds}`
Wins: `{wins}`
Top 10s: `{top10s}`
Kills: `{kills}`
Deaths: `{deaths}`
K/D: `{kd}`
Damage: `{damage}`
Longest Kill: `{longest_kill}`

**Links**
Profile: {profile_link}
defaults.missingKeyMessage: Set a PUBG API key in this node before using `{command}`.
defaults.notFoundMessage: No PUBG profile found for `{query}` on `{platform}`.
